base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fire_flower_spin — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1985 super mario bros. fire-flower's petal shape rotates through 4 phases creating subtle spin-illusion. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame petal-rotation — fire-flower's petal shape rotates through 4 phases creating subtle spin-illusion; palette cycles overworld-green → red → underworld-green → red palette per sheet note
